chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-566 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2602/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Sheraz Fazal, Advocate for Advocate for respondent No.13 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General a/w Abdul Qadir Shaikh, Executive Engineer Education Works (Resp.08) ************** Respondent No. 8 is present and has filed para-wise comments, same are taken on record. Upon perusal of the comments, it appears that the construction work of the school has been completed, while the finishing work is currently ongoing and is at its final stages. Since the construction has been substantially completed and the allocated funds have been duly utilized, we find no merit in the present petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed along with the listed application(s). However, the respondents are directed to ensure that all remaining work is completed within a period of three months and that the school is made fully functional, so that students are not deprived of a basic educational facility. A compliance report shall be submitted to this Court through the Additional Registrar for perusal. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
